apps.name: QuantumEdge AI Trader
apps.description: Institutional-grade multi-asset trading bot with reinforcement learning strategy engine. Generates high-accuracy BUY/SELL/HOLD signals across stocks, crypto, and ETFs as three independent recommendation streams. Integrates 80+ RSS financial feeds with NLP sentiment scoring. RBAC with portfolio manager, analyst, and auditor roles. Complete audit trail with SOC2-ready logging. Next-gen headless CMS for publishing trading signals and market commentary. Dark analytics dashboard with real-time P&L tracking.

apps.name: StockPulse AI Research
apps.description: Deep learning stock research platform with transformer-based earnings prediction and momentum analysis. Three-tier recommendation engine: BUY/SELL/HOLD with accuracy confidence scores backed by 5-year historical validation. RSS aggregation from Bloomberg, Reuters, SEC filings. RBAC team workspaces with shared watchlists. Full decision audit trail. CMS for publishing equity research reports with embedded charts.

apps.name: CryptoOracle Signals
apps.description: On-chain analytics crypto trading bot with whale wallet detection, DeFi protocol analysis, and cross-exchange arbitrage scanner. Delivers BUY/SELL/HOLD per token with probability-weighted accuracy metrics. RSS integration from CoinDesk, The Block, DeFi Pulse. Granular RBAC with trading desk hierarchy. Immutable audit log for regulatory compliance. Headless CMS for crypto alpha alerts and market intelligence briefs.

apps.name: ETFGenius Allocator
apps.description: Factor-model ETF allocation engine with Monte Carlo simulation and Black-Litterman optimization. Produces risk-adjusted BUY/SELL/HOLD for 500+ ETFs with Sharpe ratio targets. RSS from Vanguard, iShares, Morningstar research. RBAC for wealth managers with client-level permissions. MiFID-compliant audit logging. CMS for ETF model portfolio documentation and rebalance alerts.

apps.name: AlphaVault Portfolio
apps.description: AI-first portfolio management platform with mean-variance optimization and tail-risk hedging. Tri-asset class recommendations (stocks/crypto/ETFs) with independent accuracy tracking per asset class. RSS from 40+ macro-economic sources with GPT-4 summarization. RBAC with CIO/PM/analyst tiers. SOX-compliant audit trail. Headless CMS for investor letters and quarterly performance attribution reports.

apps.name: SignalForge Trading
apps.description: High-frequency signal generation engine with LSTM neural networks for price prediction across equities, digital assets, and exchange-traded funds. Delivers precision BUY/SELL/HOLD with win-rate statistics. RSS from Yahoo Finance, Seeking Alpha, CryptoSlate. RBAC with quant team roles and strategy compartmentalization. Audit trail with P&L attribution per signal. CMS for strategy documentation and signal performance leaderboards.

apps.name: MarketSage Insight
apps.description: Natural language market intelligence platform with GPT-powered research assistant. Generates fundamental and technical BUY/SELL/HOLD across all three asset classes with reasoning explanations. RSS from Financial Times, WSJ, Bloomberg Terminal feeds. RBAC with research director and junior analyst workflows. Complete reasoning audit trail for compliance review. CMS with Notion-style blocks for market commentary publishing.

apps.name: TradeTitan Analytics
apps.description: Enterprise trading analytics dashboard with real-time market microstructure analysis. Generates volume-weighted BUY/SELL/HOLD across stocks, crypto, and ETFs with smart order routing suggestions. RSS from Benzinga, MarketWatch, CoinTelegraph. RBAC with desk head, senior trader, and compliance officer roles. Tick-level audit logging. CMS for daily trade recap and risk commentary.

apps.name: DeepQuant Research
apps.description: Quantitative research platform with statistical arbitrage models and regime detection. Multi-timeframe BUY/SELL/HOLD across stocks, crypto, and ETFs with Bayesian confidence intervals. RSS from SSRN papers, arXiv quant-finance, Fed speeches. RBAC with research lead and quant developer roles. Reproducible research audit trail. CMS for publishing quant research with LaTeX equation support.

apps.name: RiskRadar Pro
apps.description: Risk-first trading intelligence platform with VaR modeling, stress testing, and correlation breakdown detection. Generates risk-adjusted BUY/SELL/HOLD with maximum drawdown targets per asset class. RSS from risk management journals, central bank bulletins. RBAC with CRO, risk analyst, and portfolio manager roles. Regulatory-grade audit logging with Basel III metrics. CMS for risk reports and stress test scenarios.

apps.name: SentimentAI Desk
apps.description: Social sentiment-driven trading bot with Twitter/Reddit NLP analysis, options flow detection, and short interest tracking. BUY/SELL/HOLD based on sentiment shifts across stocks, crypto, and ETFs with contrarian indicator scoring. RSS from social aggregators and alternative data providers. RBAC with sentiment analyst and execution trader roles. Sentiment-source audit trail. CMS for sentiment alpha reports.

apps.name: MacroLens Global
apps.description: Global macro trading intelligence with cross-asset correlation analysis and central bank policy modeling. Top-down BUY/SELL/HOLD for stocks, crypto, and ETFs with macro regime classification. RSS from IMF, World Bank, central bank minutes. RBAC with macro strategist and regional analyst roles. Policy-impact audit trail. CMS for macro thesis publishing with interactive world maps.

apps.name: AlgoStream Trader
apps.description: Algorithmic trading platform with genetic programming strategy evolution and walk-forward optimization. Generates systematic BUY/SELL/HOLD across all asset classes with out-of-sample validation. RSS from quant trading blogs and academic journals. RBAC with algo dev, strategy reviewer, and compliance roles. Complete backtest audit trail with version control. CMS for algo documentation and performance attribution.

apps.name: WealthPilot AI
apps.description: AI-powered wealth advisory platform with goal-based investing and tax-loss harvesting. Personalized BUY/SELL/HOLD for stocks, crypto, and ETFs aligned to client risk profiles. RSS from wealth management publications and tax authority updates. RBAC with wealth advisor, client relationship manager, and compliance roles. Fiduciary-grade audit trail. CMS for client-facing investment proposals and quarterly reviews.

apps.name: NexusTrader Terminal
apps.description: All-in-one AI trading terminal unifying technical analysis, fundamental research, and alternative data. Triple BUY/SELL/HOLD recommendation engine for stocks, crypto, and ETFs with ensemble model accuracy tracking. RSS from 100+ sources with smart categorization. Full RBAC with customizable role builder. Immutable decision-chain audit log. Next-gen CMS with drag-and-drop dashboard builder for publishing market views.
